name: 37signals
description: 37signals-inspired Rails, product design, shaping, work, and DHH judgment skills grounded in public sources.

interface.shortDescription: Rails, product, and work judgment inspired by 37signals.
interface.longDescription: A single 37signals-inspired skill plugin covering Rails architecture, Hotwire, Kamal, product/interface design, Shape Up style shaping, REWORK-style scope discipline, calm work, and DHH Rails judgment. Community-maintained, source-grounded, and not an official 37signals or Basecamp plugin.
defaultPrompt: Use 37signals skills to implement this Rails feature with source-grounded conventions.
Use 37signals product design to simplify this interface around the epicenter.
Use 37signals Shape Up and Rework judgment to prune this idea before implementation.
